'''âp-f-k''' ('''pafakasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nebularize|nebularize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-f-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nebularize|nebularize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âp-f-k
|-
! Lemma
| pafakasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pafakithi|pafakithi]] || [[word:pafakiji|pafakiji]] || [[word:pafakishi|pafakishi]] || [[word:pafaki|pafaki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafakuthuth|pafakuthuth]] || [[word:pafakujuj|pafakujuj]] || [[word:pafakushush|pafakushush]] || [[word:pafak|pafak]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafakuthu|pafakuthu]] || [[word:pafakuju|pafakuju]] || [[word:pafakushu|pafakushu]] || [[word:pafaku|pafaku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafakufuth|pafakufuth]] || [[word:pafakufuj|pafakufuj]] || [[word:pafakufush|pafakufush]] || [[word:pafakuf|pafakuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pafakethe|pafakethe]] || [[word:pafakeje|pafakeje]] || [[word:pafakeshe|pafakeshe]] || [[word:pafake|pafake]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafakothoth|pafakothoth]] || [[word:pafakojoj|pafakojoj]] || [[word:pafakoshosh|pafakoshosh]] || [[word:pafak|pafak]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafakotho|pafakotho]] || [[word:pafakojo|pafakojo]] || [[word:pafakosho|pafakosho]] || [[word:pafako|pafako]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafakofoth|pafakofoth]] || [[word:pafakofoj|pafakofoj]] || [[word:pafakofosh|pafakofosh]] || [[word:pafakof|pafakof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pafakĂŠthĂŠ|pafakĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:pafakĂŠjĂŠ|pafakĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:pafakĂŠshĂŠ|pafakĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:pafakĂŠ|pafakĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:pafakathath|pafakathath]] || [[word:pafakajaj|pafakajaj]] || [[word:pafakashash|pafakashash]] || [[word:pafak|pafak]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:pafakatha|pafakatha]] || [[word:pafakaja|pafakaja]] || [[word:pafakasha|pafakasha]] || [[word:pafaka|pafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:pafakafath|pafakafath]] || [[word:pafakafaj|pafakafaj]] || [[word:pafakafash|pafakafash]] || [[word:pafakaf|pafakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:pafakasha|pafakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopafakasha|gopafakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipafakasha|gokipafakasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pafaknĂŒsha|pafaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopafaknknĂŒsha|gopafaknknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipafaknĂŒsha|gokipafaknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pafakshĂ«sha|pafakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopafaknkshĂ«sha|gopafaknkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipafakshĂ«sha|gokipafakshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:pafakrosha|pafakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopafaknkrosha|gopafaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipafakrosha|gokipafakrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:pafakmusha|pafakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafaknkmusha|gopafaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafakmusha|gokipafakmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pafaksherasha|pafaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopafaknksherasha|gopafaknksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipafaksherasha|gokipafaksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pafakngasha|pafakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopafaknkngasha|gopafaknkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipafakngasha|gokipafakngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:pafakyasha|pafakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopafaknkyasha|gopafaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipafakyasha|gokipafakyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:pafakyamasha|pafakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopafaknkyamasha|gopafaknkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipafakyamasha|gokipafakyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pafaknĂŒshĂ«sha|pafaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopafaknknĂŒshĂ«sha|gopafaknknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipafaknĂŒshĂ«sha|gokipafaknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pafaknĂŒrosha|pafaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopafaknknĂŒrosha|gopafaknknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipafaknĂŒrosha|gokipafaknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafaknĂŒmusha|pafaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafaknknĂŒmusha|gopafaknknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafaknĂŒmusha|gokipafaknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pafakshĂ«nĂŒsha|pafakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopafaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gopafaknkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipafakshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokipafakshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pafakshĂ«rosha|pafakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopafaknkshĂ«rosha|gopafaknkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipafakshĂ«rosha|gokipafakshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafakshĂ«musha|pafakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafaknkshĂ«musha|gopafaknkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafakshĂ«musha|gokipafakshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:pafakronĂŒsha|pafakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopafaknkronĂŒsha|gopafaknkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipafakronĂŒsha|gokipafakronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:pafakroshĂ«sha|pafakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopafaknkroshĂ«sha|gopafaknkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipafakroshĂ«sha|gokipafakroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pafakromusha|pafakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopafaknkromusha|gopafaknkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipafakromusha|gokipafakromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:pafakmunĂŒsha|pafakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopafaknkmunĂŒsha|gopafaknkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipafakmunĂŒsha|gokipafakmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:pafakmushĂ«sha|pafakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopafaknkmushĂ«sha|gopafaknkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipafakmushĂ«sha|gokipafakmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pafakmurosha|pafakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopafaknkmurosha|gopafaknkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipafakmurosha|gokipafakmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pafak|pafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:pĂŠfĂŠk|pĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopafak|hopafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hopĂŠfĂŠk|hopĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopafak|hohopafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopĂŠfĂŠk|hohopĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒpafak|nĂŒpafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒpĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŒpĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpafak|nĂŒnĂŒpafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŒnĂŒpĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻpafak|nĂŻpafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻpĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŻpĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpafak|nĂŻnĂŻpafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠfĂŠk|nĂŻnĂŻpĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupafak|lupafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lupĂŠfĂŠk|lupĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupafak|lulupafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupĂŠfĂŠk|lulupĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipafak|lipafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lipĂŠfĂŠk|lipĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipafak|lilipafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipĂŠfĂŠk|lilipĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopafak|kopafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kopĂŠfĂŠk|kopĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopafak|kokopafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopĂŠfĂŠk|kokopĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepafak|kepafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kepĂŠfĂŠk|kepĂŠfĂŠk]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepafak|kekepafak]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepĂŠfĂŠk|kekepĂŠfĂŠk]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
